---
title: "Construction and basic editing of the phylogenetic trees assessing _Epichloë_ specimens"
author: "Sotomayor-Alge, Alba"
date: "05-26-2025"
output:
  bookdown::pdf_book:
    toc: yes
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: yes
    highlight: tango
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
---

\newpage

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE)
```

# Working session setup

```{r Load packages into working session}

# Function to silently load packages without warnings or messages
load_packages <- function(pkgs) {
  invisible(
    lapply(pkgs, function(pkg) {
      suppressWarnings(
        suppressMessages(
          if (!require(pkg, character.only = TRUE, quietly = TRUE)) {
            stop(paste("❌ Package not found:", pkg), call. = FALSE)
          }
        )
      )
    })
  )
}

# Vector of required packages
packages_needed <- c("dplyr", "tidyr", "ggtree", "ggtreeExtra", "ggplot2", 
                     "treeio", "scatterpie", "ape", "openxlsx", "tibble",
                     "patchwork", "ape")

# Call the function to load them
load_packages(packages_needed)

```

```{r Working session information}

# Print the information of the working session in order to ensure reproducibility
sessionInfo()

```

```{r Create directories}

# Create directories within the file system to save the results of the analyses
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/1_actG", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/2_CalM", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/3_ITS", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/4_tefA", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/5_tubB", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree", recursive = TRUE, 
           showWarnings = FALSE)

```

\newpage

# Generate individual phylogenetic trees (*actG*, *CalM*, ITS region, *tefA*, *tubB*)

```{r Obtain ufboot tables for individual trees (5 genes)}

# Function to extract UFbootstrap values from an IQ-TREE tree and save them 
# into an Excel file compatible with ggtree joins
extract_iqtree_ufboot_to_xlsx <- function(treefile, out_xlsx) {

  # Read the phylogenetic tree produced by IQ-TREE
  tr <- read.tree(treefile)

  # Get the number of terminal taxa (tips) and internal nodes
  n_tip  <- length(tr$tip.label)
  n_node <- tr$Nnode

  # Build a table using the same node numbering used by ggtree
  boot <- tibble(node   = (n_tip + 1):(n_tip + n_node),
                 ufboot = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(tr$node.label)))

  # Write the bootstrap table to an Excel file
  write.xlsx(boot, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)

  # Inform the user that the file was created successfully
  message("Excel created successfully: ", out_xlsx)
}


# Create a list of containing the genes to process
genes <- c("actG", "CalM", "ITS", "tefA", "tubB")

# Loop through each gene:
for (i in seq_along(genes)) {
  gene <- genes[i]

  # Create/Select the gene-specific output directory
  out_dir_phy <- paste0("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/", i, "_", gene, "/")
  dir.create(out_dir_phy, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # Run the extraction function for ufboot values
  extract_iqtree_ufboot_to_xlsx(
    treefile = paste0("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/MSA_", gene, "_UFBoot1000.treefile"),
    out_xlsx = paste0(out_dir_phy, "UFBoot_values_", gene, ".xlsx")
  )
}

```

```{r Plot individual phylogenetic trees (5 genes)}

# Function to process and plot each tree
process_tree <- function(gene_name, index) {

  # Define file paths
  treefile_path <- paste0("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/MSA_", gene_name, "_UFBoot1000.treefile")

  output_dir <- paste0("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/", index, "_", gene_name, "/")
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

  # UFboot excel inside each gene folder
  ufbootfile_path <- paste0(output_dir, "UFBoot_values_", gene_name, ".xlsx")

  # Safety checks
  if (!file.exists(treefile_path)) stop("Tree file not found: ", treefile_path)
  if (!file.exists(ufbootfile_path)) stop("UFboot xlsx not found: ", ufbootfile_path)

  # Load and transform the tree
  tree <- read.tree(treefile_path)
  tree$edge.length <- sqrt(sqrt(tree$edge.length))

  # Create ggtree object
  base_tree <- ggtree(tree, size = 0.4)

  # Extract internal node coordinates
  tree_coords <- base_tree$data %>% dplyr::filter(isTip == FALSE)

  # Load UFbootstrap values
  ufboot <- read.xlsx(ufbootfile_path)

  # Check required columns
  if (!all(c("node", "ufboot") %in% names(ufboot))) {
    stop("UFboot file must contain columns 'node' and 'ufboot': ", ufbootfile_path)
  }

  # Merge coordinates with bootstrap
  tree_data <- left_join(tree_coords, ufboot, by = "node")

  # Plot with UFbootstrap values
  tree_with_boot <- base_tree +
    geom_label2(data = tree_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = ufboot),
                color = "black", size = 3) +
    geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
    xlim(0, max(base_tree$data$x) + 1)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_dir, gene_name, "_individual_ufboot.pdf"),
    plot = tree_with_boot,
    width = 8.27, height = 11.69, units = "in"
  )

  # Plot without UFbootstrap values
  tree_empty <- base_tree +
    geom_label2(data = tree_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = NA)) +
    geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = TRUE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
    xlim(0, max(base_tree$data$x) + 2)

  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_dir, gene_name, "_individual_empty.pdf"),
    plot = tree_empty,
    width = 8.27, height = 11.69, units = "in"
  )
}

# Apply the function to all genes
invisible(mapply(process_tree, genes, seq_along(genes)))

```

\newpage

# Generate ASTRAL species trees

```{r Obtain Qs & PP tables for the ASTRAL species tree}

# Helper function to parse a node label that contains quartet values (q1, q2, q3)
# and returns a numeric vector c(q1, q2, q3) or c(NA, NA, NA) if it cannot parse.
parse_astral_quartets <- function(lbl) {

  if (is.null(lbl) || is.na(lbl)) return(c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_))
  lbl <- as.character(lbl)

  # If there are explicit keys like q1=..., q2=..., q3=...
  has_keys <- grepl("q1\\s*=", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE) &&
              grepl("q2\\s*=", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE) &&
              grepl("q3\\s*=", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)

  if (has_keys) {
    q1 <- sub(".*q1\\s*=\\s*([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)
    q2 <- sub(".*q2\\s*=\\s*([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)
    q3 <- sub(".*q3\\s*=\\s*([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)
    return(as.numeric(c(q1, q2, q3)))
  }

  # If there are three values separated by / , ; | :
  # e.g. "0.2/0.5/0.3" or "0.2,0.5,0.3"
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(lbl, "[/\\|,;:]+"))
  parts <- parts[nchar(parts) > 0]

  if (length(parts) >= 3) {
    return(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(parts[1:3])))
  }

  # If nothing works
  c(NA_real_, NA_real_, NA_real_)
}

# Extract quartet supports from an ASTRAL tree and save to Excel
extract_astral_Q_to_xlsx <- function(treefile, out_xlsx) {

  # Read ASTRAL species tree
  tr <- read.tree(treefile)

  # Node numbering compatible with ggtree
  n_tip  <- length(tr$tip.label)
  n_node <- tr$Nnode
  internal_nodes <- (n_tip + 1):(n_tip + n_node)

  # ASTRAL support is typically stored in tr$node.label
  labels <- tr$node.label

  # Parse q1/q2/q3 for each internal node label
  Qmat <- t(vapply(labels, parse_astral_quartets, numeric(3)))
  colnames(Qmat) <- c("q1", "q2", "q3")

  # Build final table
  Q_df <- tibble(
    node = internal_nodes,
    q1 = Qmat[, "q1"],
    q2 = Qmat[, "q2"],
    q3 = Qmat[, "q3"]
  )

  # Save to Excel
  write.xlsx(Q_df, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)
  message("ASTRAL Q Excel created successfully: ", out_xlsx)

  # Helpful warning if parsing failed
  if (all(is.na(Q_df$q1)) && all(is.na(Q_df$q2)) && all(is.na(Q_df$q3))) {
    message("Warning: q1/q2/q3 are all NA. The quartet values may not be 
            stored in node labels in this treefile.")
  }
}

# Extract quartet supports from the species tree (Qs)
extract_astral_Q_to_xlsx(
  treefile = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ASTRAL_SPTREE_10022026_Q",
  out_xlsx = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree/Q_values_ASTRAL_SPTREE.xlsx"
)


# Helper function to parse a node label containing a posterior probability.
# Accepts formats like "0.98", "pp=0.98", "PP=0.98" and returns numeric or NA.
parse_astral_pp <- function(lbl) {

  if (is.null(lbl) || is.na(lbl)) return(NA_real_)
  lbl <- as.character(lbl)

  # If it contains pp=...
  if (grepl("pp\\s*=", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)) {
    val <- sub(".*pp\\s*=\\s*([0-9.]+).*", "\\1", lbl, ignore.case = TRUE)
    return(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(val)))
  }

  # Otherwise, try direct numeric conversion
  suppressWarnings(as.numeric(lbl))
}


# Extract posterior probabilities from an ASTRAL tree and save to Excel. Node 
# numbering matches ggtree: internal nodes = (Ntip+1)..(Ntip+Nnode)

extract_astral_PP_to_xlsx <- function(treefile, out_xlsx) {

  # Read ASTRAL species tree
  tr <- read.tree(treefile)

  # Node numbering compatible with ggtree
  n_tip  <- length(tr$tip.label)
  n_node <- tr$Nnode
  internal_nodes <- (n_tip + 1):(n_tip + n_node)

  # PP usually stored in tr$node.label
  labels <- tr$node.label

  PP_df <- tibble(
    node = internal_nodes,
    pp   = vapply(labels, parse_astral_pp, numeric(1))
  )

  write.xlsx(PP_df, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)
  message("ASTRAL PP Excel created successfully: ", out_xlsx)

  if (all(is.na(PP_df$pp))) {
    message("Warning: pp is all NA. The PP values may not be stored in node labels in this treefile.")
  }
}

# Extract posterior probability values from species tree (PP)
extract_astral_PP_to_xlsx(
  treefile = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ASTRAL_SPTREE_10022026_PP",
  out_xlsx = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree/PP_values_ASTRAL_SPTREE.xlsx")

```

```{r Plot ASTRAL species tree with quartet values and posterior probabilities}

# Define tree types and their corresponding Excel files
tree_configs <- list(
  Q  = list(tree_file = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ASTRAL_SPTREE_10022026_Q",
            data_file = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree/Q_values_ASTRAL_SPTREE.xlsx"),
  PP = list(tree_file = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ASTRAL_SPTREE_10022026_PP",
            data_file = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree/PP_values_ASTRAL_SPTREE.xlsx")
)

# Function to process each ASTRAL tree
process_astral_tree <- function(suffix, config) {

  # Define paths
  tree_path  <- config$tree_file
  value_path <- config$data_file
  base_name  <- paste0("ASTRALSP_tree_", suffix)
  output_pdf <- paste0("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/6_Speciestree/", base_name, ".pdf")

  # Check file existence
  if (!file.exists(tree_path)) stop("Tree file not found: ", tree_path)
  if (!file.exists(value_path)) stop("Data file not found: ", value_path)

  # Load and prepare the tree
  tree <- read.tree(tree_path)
  base_tree <- ggtree(tree, size = 0.4, layout = "rectangular")
  tree_coords <- base_tree$data %>% filter(isTip == FALSE)

  # Load support values
  support_data <- read.xlsx(value_path)

  # Ensure 'node' column exists
  if (!"node" %in% colnames(support_data)) {
    stop("The support file does not contain a 'node' column: ", value_path)
  }

  # Merge coordinates with support data
  merged_data <- left_join(tree_coords, support_data, by = "node")

  # Check that the merge produced usable data
  if (nrow(merged_data) == 0) {
    stop("No matching nodes between tree and support data for suffix: _", suffix)
  }

  # Start building the plot
  plot <- base_tree + geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = TRUE)

  if (suffix == "Q") {
    # Convert columns to numeric
    merged_data$q1 <- as.numeric(merged_data$q1)
    merged_data$q2 <- as.numeric(merged_data$q2)
    merged_data$q3 <- as.numeric(merged_data$q3)

    plot <- plot +
      geom_scatterpie(data = merged_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, r = 0.35),
                      cols = c("q1", "q2", "q3"), color = "black", size = 0.3) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = c("q1" = "#855885", "q2" = "#f1a340", "q3" = "#f7f7f7")) +
      xlim(0, max(base_tree$data$x, na.rm = TRUE) + 6) +
      ylim(0, max(base_tree$data$y, na.rm = TRUE) + 2)

  } else if (suffix == "PP") {
    merged_data$pp <- as.numeric(merged_data$pp)

    plot <- plot +
      geom_label2(data = merged_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = pp),
                  color = "black", size = 3) +
      scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
      xlim(NA, 22) +
      ylim(NA, 38)
  }

  # Save final plot
  ggsave(output_pdf, plot = plot, width = 8.10, height = 12.5, units = "in")
}

# Run the function for all species tree types
invisible(mapply(process_astral_tree, names(tree_configs), tree_configs))

```

\newpage

# Generate ML (concatenated) phylogenetic tree

```{r Obtain SCFL and ufboot tables for the ML tree}

# Extract node, sCF (scfl) and Label (ufboot) directly from IQ-TREE cf.stat file
# and save the values into an excel file
extract_scfl_and_ufboot_from_cfstat <- function(cf_stat_file, out_xlsx) {

  # Read cf.stat ignoring comment lines starting with '#'
  stat <- read.delim(
    cf_stat_file,
    sep = "\t",
    header = TRUE,
    comment.char = "#",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    check.names = FALSE
  )

  # Validate required columns
  required_cols <- c("ID", "sCF", "Label")
  if (!all(required_cols %in% names(stat))) {
    stop("cf.stat must contain columns: ID, sCF, Label")
  }

  # Select and rename columns to match your plotting pipeline
  out <- stat %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      node   = as.numeric(ID),
      scfl   = as.numeric(sCF),
      ufboot = as.numeric(Label)
    )

  # Save Excel
  write.xlsx(out, out_xlsx, overwrite = TRUE)

  message("Excel with node, scfl and ufboot created: ", out_xlsx)
}

# Extract the values and save them into an excel file
extract_scfl_and_ufboot_from_cfstat(
  cf_stat_file = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ML_TREE.cf.stat",
  out_xlsx = "G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree/UFBoot_and_scfl_values_MLtree.xlsx"
)

```

```{r Plot ML tree with UFboot and SCFL values}

# Load the tree
treeML <- read.tree("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/MOLECULAR_ANALYSIS/ML_TREE.treefile")
treeML$edge.length <- sqrt(sqrt(treeML$edge.length))
base_treeML <- ggtree(treeML, size = 0.4, layout = "rectangular")

# Extract coordinates
treeML_coordinates <- base_treeML$data
treeML_coordinates <- treeML_coordinates %>% filter(isTip == FALSE)

# Load posterior probabilities data set 
bootscfl <- read.xlsx("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree/UFBoot_and_scfl_values_MLtree.xlsx")

# Reformat and create joint table with all the information
ML_data <- left_join(treeML_coordinates, bootscfl, by = "node")
ML_data$scfl <- as.numeric(ML_data$scfl) 

# Display tree with BS values
ML_tree_bootstrap <- base_treeML +
  geom_label2(data = ML_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = ufboot), 
              color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = T) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
  xlim(0, max(base_treeML$data$x) + 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(1, 0)) +   # Aumentar el espacio horizontal
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.1, 0))    # Aumentar el espacio vertical

ggsave("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree/MLtree_ufboot.pdf",
       plot = ML_tree_bootstrap,
       width = 8.27, height = 11.69, units = "in")


# Display tree with SCFL values
ML_tree_SCFL <- base_treeML +
  geom_label2(data = ML_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = scfl), 
              color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = T) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
  xlim(0, max(base_treeML$data$x) + 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(1, 0)) +   # Aumentar el espacio horizontal
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.1, 0))    # Aumentar el espacio vertical

ggsave("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree/MLtree_scfl.pdf",
       plot = ML_tree_SCFL,
       width = 8.27, height = 11.69, units = "in")


# Display tree empty
ML_tree_empty <- base_treeML +
  geom_label2(data = ML_data, aes(x = x, y = y, group = node, label = NA), 
              color = "black", size = 3) +
  geom_tiplab(size = 4, align = T) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = "#f7f7f7") +
  xlim(0, max(base_treeML$data$x) + 3) +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(1, 0)) +   # Aumentar el espacio horizontal
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.1, 0))    # Aumentar el espacio vertical

ggsave("G:/ESPORAS_SPCOMP/outputs_script2/7_MLtree/MLtree_empty.pdf",
       plot = ML_tree_empty,
       width = 9.0, height = 11.69, units = "in")

```


```{r End of script}

# Message announcing the end of the script and where to find the output files
cat("\n✅ Script executed successfully.\n\nAll output files are available in 'FrothEpi_Github/Fungal_endophyte/data/outputs_script#3 \nwithin the GitHub repository downloaded by the user.\n")

```
